# Movement Cards

**Constraint flags built in:**
- This intro bullet is before any tier heading and must NOT be parsed as a card

---

## Tier 1 - Micro (20-90 seconds, +1 XP)

*Fires after: a single focused task.*

**Purpose:** interrupt the phone-grab.

- Perineum drop, 3 breaths
- Hum check, lowest pitch 30 sec
- Doorframe stretch, 5 sec hold x3

## Tier 2 - Meso (3-8 minutes, +3 XP)

- Single pair release, left sacrum ball 3 min
- T12 ball, back ribs into ball

## Tier 3 - Macro (20-45+ minutes, +10 XP)

- Full Big 4, all four pairs bottom up
- Long walk with perineum drop cadence
